    In deepest hush of silence bend
    The lone adoring knee,
    And only silence bring
    Into the sanctuary.

    And ask no warmer comfort for thy heart?

    I call

title: The Broker Of Dreams
content:
Bring not your dreams to me - 
    Blown dust, and vapour, and the running stream - 
    Saying, "He, too, doth dream,

title: Resurrection
content:

The Rival

Water in hidden glens

title: Young Love XIII - Met Once More
content:

title: Ballade Of Love's Cloister
content:
Had I the gold that some so vainly spend,

title: The Bloom Upon The Grape

title: The End Of Laughter
content:

    O never laugh again,

As one, the secret lover of a queen,

title: Home ...
Summer Going
content:
Crickets calling,
    Apples falling.

    Summer dying,
    Life is flying.

    So soon over - 
    Love and lover.

title: I Meant To Do My Work To-Day
content:

content:
Songs I sang of lordly matters,
    Life and death, and stars and sea;
    Nothing of them now remains
    But the song I sang for thee.

content:

    What was the dream that he drew her by,
    Or was she only bought?
